data.content: Approved in implementation review: rollbackBeatState coverage now exercises knots and beads rollback paths, propagates knots exec failures, verifies JSON escaping for quoted beat IDs, and confirms empty/undefined reasons do not emit notes. Verified against src/lib/memory-manager-commands.ts and reran bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run lint src/lib/__tests__/memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts, and bun run build successfully.
